name: Mansion #26
description: Fargh al-Mukdim, 'The First Spout,' ruled by Saturn, represents the first outpouring of celestial blessing through structure and discipline. Particularly favorable for digging wells, establishing water sources, and creating sustainable foundations. Alpha and Beta Pegasi form the first spout of the great celestial bucket, channeling divine blessings into earthly form. The artwork renders these stars in Saturn's structured indigo-silver palette with flowing geometric channels representing ordered abundance and sustainable resources.

attributes.value: Digging wells, establishing foundations, creating sustainable resources, building
